title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Allcargo Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Allcargo Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allcargo Logistics family as a Distribution Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allcargo Logistics:
Allcargo Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allcargo Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
